title: Call for proposals: Renewal evaluation of the International Centre for Capacity-building in Intangible Cultural Heritage in the Arab States (ICCBICH)
content: The UNESCO Living Heritage Entity is looking for a team of experts/evaluators to carry out a renewal evaluation of the International Centre for Capacity-building in Intangible Cultural Heritage in the Arab States (ICCBICH), a UNESCO Category 2 Centre based in Sharjah, the United Arab Emirates. Proposals …

sourceDescription: UNESCO is publishing once a week news on its activities regarding the safeguarding of intangible cultural heritage
